_meta.what: Enumeration of узлы with a FIXED внутриузловой tariff distance — CLOSED at exactly 2.
_meta.provenance: sourced-official — consultant.ru LAW_63243 (ТР-4 кн.1, Приказ МПС 55/2003), Минтранс 313/2024; verbatim cross-confirmed.
_meta.answer: Only «Московский узел» (54 км) and «Санкт-Петербургский узел» (25 км) carry a fixed-km adder. Екатеринбург/Новосибирск/Челябинск are ordinary Книга-3 ТП (no adder).

uzly.exclusion: same-radial-line: NOT added if wagon enters AND exits the узел on the same radial line of the Малое кольцо; passenger/baggage variant = 20 км
uzly.current_wording_2026: Малое кольцо Московской ж.д. (10 radial directions, 22 connecting branches) per Минтранс №313/2024
uzly.label: sourced-official

uzly.exclusion: same-radial-line: NOT added if wagon enters AND exits on the same radial line of the СПб узел
uzly.label: sourced-official

explicitly_checked_and_NOT_fixed_km_uzly.status: major транзитный пункт / узловая станция in Книга 3, distance read from ТП↔ТП backbone — NO fixed-km узел adder
explicitly_checked_and_NOT_fixed_km_uzly.label: sourced-official (absence verified)
